R1_batch_io_and_alloc.changes: batch serialize IO + eliminate per-node to_vec

R2_ffi_fix_plus_prefetch.changes: FFI lazy bitset alloc + slab prefetch + TRACE_SLAB (all in one commit)

R3_remove_trace_slab_fix_prefetch.changes: remove TRACE_SLAB, change prefetch offsets -- regression: prefetch causing L1 thrash

R4_remove_prefetch.changes: remove prefetch call site -- FFI fix benefit revealed: +22% vs R1

key_learnings.ffi_lazy_bitset: Moving bitset_view/sparse_bitset creation inside branches eliminates 135KB/call at 796 QPS/s = +22% QPS
key_learnings.prefetch_danger: 64 neighbors * 4 prefetch lines * 128 candidates = 32768 cache fills/search evicts scratch buffer from L1 -> QPS halved
key_learnings.trace_env_var: std::env::var_os() acquires global RwLock; even at 0.1% overhead it shows up at 796 QPS * 16 workers
